description: Style NoteEvery item of clothing requires a different kind of innerwear to give the best comfort and the right look. enamor specialises in customised innerwear which will ensure a good overall look for you and lasting comfort throughout the day. And no need to compromise on the trendy look and style of your innerwear either, Enamor is your go to brand for the innerwear that takes care of all your requirements. Product DetailsPink floral printed brassiere, underwired, medium coverage, has a sweetheart neckline, intricately patterned elastic at the dé colleté , adjustable straps and a single adjustable hook and eye clasp at the backMaterial and Care92% polyester and 8% spandexHand washDo not iron or bleachDrip dry Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
